description: Hand-curated Agent Commerce seed. Inputs feed scoring; composite is derived by scripts/build-agent-commerce-seed.mjs.

entries.name: x402
entries.brief: HTTP 402 Payment Required reincarnated as a stablecoin-settled per-call protocol for agent-to-agent payments.

entries.name: x402scan
entries.brief: Block-explorer-style index of live x402-priced services across the web. List, filter, inspect.

entries.name: Skyfire
entries.brief: Payment + identity rails for AI agents. Spend caps, audit trails, KYC for autonomous agents.

entries.name: Coinbase Agent Wallet
entries.brief: MPC-backed wallets agents can spin up with one API call. Spend limits, x402 native.

entries.name: Crossmint
entries.brief: Wallets-as-a-service for agents. Email/social login, embedded smart wallets, fiat onramp.

entries.name: Privy
entries.brief: Embedded wallets + auth for human + agent flows. Server-signing for autonomous use.

entries.name: Turnkey
entries.brief: Programmable signing infra. Policy-engine for agent transactions, hardware-backed root keys.

entries.name: Magic
entries.brief: Passwordless auth + non-custodial wallet SDK. Used as identity layer for many agent apps.

entries.name: Dynamic
entries.brief: Multi-chain wallet auth + embedded wallets. Smart-account abstractions baked in.

entries.name: ERC-8004
entries.brief: Trustless agent identity standard. Cryptographic proofs for agent provenance + reputation.

entries.name: Smithery
entries.brief: MCP server registry + 1-click install. The npm of Model Context Protocol.

entries.name: MCP.run
entries.brief: Hosted MCP servers + agent harness. Run MCP tools without managing the server lifecycle.

entries.name: Awesome MCP Servers
entries.brief: Curated list of MCP servers. The de-facto starting point for MCP discovery.

entries.name: Agentic.market
entries.brief: Marketplace + directory for agent-callable services and tools.

entries.name: OpenRouter
entries.brief: Single API gateway to 200+ LLMs. Pay-per-token across providers, automatic failover.

entries.name: Replicate
entries.brief: Run open-source ML models via API. Per-second pricing, agent-friendly.

entries.name: Hugging Face Spaces
entries.brief: Hosted ML demo apps + serverless inference. Many expose API endpoints agents can call.

entries.name: Tavily
entries.brief: Search API tuned for AI agents. Real-time web results, citations, content extraction.

entries.name: Exa
entries.brief: Embeddings-based search engine for AI. Find URLs by meaning, not keywords.

entries.name: Brave Search API
entries.brief: Independent search index with API access. Used by many agent stacks for grounded retrieval.

entries.name: Perplexity Sonar API
entries.brief: Live-web LLM with citations exposed as a per-call API. Drop-in for grounded chat.

entries.name: Anthropic API
entries.brief: Claude models via API. Tool use, prompt caching, extended thinking, MCP-native.

entries.name: OpenAI API
entries.brief: GPT-4o + reasoning models, embeddings, vision, audio. Function calling baseline.

entries.name: Together AI
entries.brief: Open-source LLM inference at scale. DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen via per-token API.

entries.name: Fireworks AI
entries.brief: Fast inference for open-source models. Function-calling tuned, agent workloads.

entries.name: Groq
entries.brief: LPU-backed inference at sub-100ms latency. Ideal for agent loops.

entries.name: FireCrawl
entries.brief: Crawl + clean web content into LLM-ready markdown. JS rendering, sitemap walk.

entries.name: Apify
entries.brief: Web-scraping marketplace. 5000+ pre-built actors with usage-based pricing.

entries.name: Diffbot
entries.brief: Knowledge graph + structured extraction APIs. Article, product, image classification.

entries.name: Serper
entries.brief: Google SERP API. Cheap, fast, no scraping headaches.

entries.name: GitHub MCP Server
entries.brief: Official MCP server for GitHub. Repos, issues, PRs, search — all callable from any MCP client.

entries.name: Slack MCP Server
entries.brief: MCP server for Slack workspaces. Read channels, post messages, manage threads.

entries.name: Stripe MCP Server
entries.brief: Stripe-native MCP. Charges, customers, subscriptions — let agents handle billing.

entries.name: Linear MCP
entries.brief: Linear issue tracker as MCP. Create issues, query backlogs, transition states. Multiple community implementations.

entries.name: Notion MCP
entries.brief: Notion workspace as MCP. Pages, databases, search — all agent-readable.

entries.name: Postgres MCP
entries.brief: Read-only Postgres for MCP clients. Schema introspection + parameterized queries.

entries.name: Filesystem MCP
entries.brief: Sandboxed filesystem read/write for MCP clients. The 'hello world' of MCP servers.

entries.name: Puppeteer MCP
entries.brief: Headless browser as MCP. Navigate, click, scrape — for agents that need a real browser.

entries.name: Memory MCP
entries.brief: Knowledge-graph memory store for MCP clients. Persistent agent context across sessions.

entries.name: Brave Search MCP
entries.brief: Brave Search exposed as MCP. Web + local search for any MCP client.

entries.name: Toolhouse
entries.brief: Production tool registry for AI agents. Auth-aware, observability built-in.

entries.name: Composio
entries.brief: 150+ pre-built integrations as agent tools. OAuth, retries, schemas — handled.

entries.name: Daimo Pay
entries.brief: Stablecoin payments SDK. Cross-chain checkout, agent-callable, low-fee.

entries.name: Lit Protocol
entries.brief: Decentralized signing + access control. Agents can hold keys without custody.

entries.name: Privado ID
entries.brief: ZK-based decentralized identity. Verifiable credentials for agent provenance.

entries.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
entries.brief: Official agent loop, handoffs, and guardrails from OpenAI. Production-ready.

entries.name: LangChain
entries.brief: Agent + chain framework. Massive integration surface, OSS-first.

entries.name: LlamaIndex
entries.brief: Data framework for LLM agents. RAG, indices, agent abstractions.

entries.name: Modal
entries.brief: Serverless GPU/CPU compute. Function-as-an-API for agent workloads.

entries.name: ElevenLabs
entries.brief: Voice synthesis API. Per-character pricing, agent-friendly streaming.

entries.name: Browserbase
entries.brief: Headless-browser-as-a-service for agents. Stealth, captchas, session replay.

entries.name: Para
entries.brief: MPC embedded + server wallets across EVM/Solana/Cosmos. Identity-portable agent wallets — KYC once, delegate to agent. Formerly Capsule.

entries.name: Fireblocks
entries.brief: Institutional MPC custody with AI Suite (AI Link MCP + Genie). Policy engine + spend limits drive agent ops; embedded wallets support x402 + MPP.

entries.name: MetaMask Embedded Wallets
entries.brief: Web3Auth rebranded under MetaMask. MPC TSS + SSS, OAuth login, MetaMask smart accounts integration. No agent-specific story today.

entries.name: Braintrust
entries.brief: End-to-end LLM eval, prompt playground, and observability. Used by OpenAI, Stripe, Notion to ship agents safely.

entries.name: Helicone
entries.brief: Open-source LLM observability gateway. Drop-in proxy logs every prompt, token, latency, cost, and error.

entries.name: LangSmith
entries.brief: LangChain's hosted observability + eval platform. Trace agent runs, debug tool calls, run datasets through prompt versions.

entries.name: Langfuse
entries.brief: Open-source LLM observability. Self-hostable, OpenTelemetry-compatible, full tracing + eval + prompt management.

entries.name: Arize Phoenix
entries.brief: OSS LLM observability + eval from Arize. Local-first OpenTelemetry tracing for agents, RAG, eval pipelines.

entries.name: Stagehand
entries.brief: Browserbase's LLM-driven browser action SDK. Natural-language instructions translated into Playwright steps.

entries.name: browser-use
entries.brief: OSS Python library: enable any LLM to control a browser. Powers many vertical agent stacks; very fast-moving repo.

entries.name: Hyperbrowser
entries.brief: Headless-browser cloud built for AI agents. Anti-detection, session replay, scrape APIs.

entries.name: Steel
entries.brief: Open browser API for agents. Sessions, anti-detection, observability, cloud + self-host.

entries.name: E2B
entries.brief: Sandboxed cloud runtime for AI-generated code. Spin up Linux VMs in <200ms; ideal for agent code-execution.

entries.name: Daytona
entries.brief: Open-source secure dev-environment runtime, repositioned as agent sandbox. Per-second billing, snapshots, root-access.

entries.name: Vercel Sandbox
entries.brief: Vercel's secure code-execution sandbox for agents. Serverless VMs spin up per-request, billed per ms.

entries.name: CrewAI
entries.brief: Multi-agent orchestration framework. Role-based agents collaborate on complex tasks via task delegation + memory.

entries.name: Microsoft AutoGen
entries.brief: Microsoft Research's multi-agent conversational framework. Production-grade, Python + .NET, async + group chat.

entries.name: LangGraph
entries.brief: Stateful agent runtime from LangChain. DAG/cyclic graphs of LLM calls + tools with checkpointing + human-in-loop.

entries.name: smolagents
entries.brief: Hugging Face's minimalist agent framework. <1k lines, code-action paradigm where the LLM writes Python tool calls directly.

entries.name: Pydantic AI
entries.brief: Type-safe agent framework from the Pydantic team. Schema-first tool definitions, structured outputs, model-agnostic.

entries.name: Cloudflare MCP
entries.brief: Cloudflare's MCP server suite + Workers MCP runtime. Deploy MCP servers globally on Cloudflare's edge with x402 baked in.

entries.name: Sentry MCP
entries.brief: Official Sentry MCP server. Query issues, releases, performance traces from any MCP client.

entries.name: ClickHouse MCP
entries.brief: MCP server for ClickHouse. Schema introspection + parameterized queries against analytical workloads.

entries.name: Vercel MCP
entries.brief: Vercel-hosted MCP servers + the @vercel/mcp-adapter for serverless MCP runtimes.

entries.name: Supabase MCP
entries.brief: Official Supabase MCP server. Query Postgres, manage auth, edit storage from any MCP client.

entries.name: RapidAPI
entries.brief: Largest API marketplace — 40K+ APIs with unified billing, OAuth, monitoring. Heavily used as agent tool source.

pricing.value: varies by API; free tiers common

entries.name: Alpha Vantage
entries.brief: Free + paid market-data API. Stock prices, forex, crypto, fundamentals, technical indicators.

entries.name: Etherscan API
entries.brief: Ethereum block-explorer API. Account balances, transaction history, contract source — universal on-chain data tool.

entries.name: Polygon ID
entries.brief: ZK-based decentralized identity from Polygon. Verifiable credentials for agent provenance + selective disclosure.

entries.name: World
entries.brief: Worldcoin's proof-of-personhood protocol + World Chain. World ID verifies a human (or human-controlled agent) without revealing identity.

entries.name: Artificial Analysis
entries.brief: LLM benchmarking + price aggregation. Cross-provider quality, latency, $/M-token leaderboard updated weekly.

entries.name: x402-rs
entries.brief: Production-grade Rust SDK for x402 — verify, settle, monitor. Used in latency-sensitive facilitator deployments.

entries.name: x402-openai (Python)
entries.brief: Drop-in OpenAI Python client that handles x402 challenges transparently. Pays per-call when servers return 402.

entries.name: a2a-x402
entries.brief: Google's Agent-to-Agent x402 extension. Brings HTTP 402 settlement into the A2A agent communication layer.

entries.name: ACP (Agentic Commerce Protocol)
entries.brief: OpenAI + Stripe spec for agent ↔ merchant commerce. Cart, items, fulfillment — complementary to x402's payment rail.

entries.name: AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol)
entries.brief: Google's Agent Payments Protocol. Cryptographically signed mandates authorize specific agent purchases — often paired with x402.

entries.name: Cubist
entries.brief: TEE-based key management for agents. Hardware-isolated signing with policy controls; Solana + EVM.

entries.name: MotleyCrew
entries.brief: Multi-agent orchestration framework. Combines CrewAI/LangChain/LlamaIndex into a single declarative graph.

entries.name: n8n
entries.brief: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

entries.name: gemini-cli
entries.brief: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

entries.name: TrendRadar
entries.brief: ⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 +  RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 +  AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构

entries.brief: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

entries.brief: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

entries.brief: A powerful MCP toolkit for coding, providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities  - the IDE for your agent

entries.brief: Agent2Agent (A2A) is an open protocol enabling communication and interoperability between opaque agentic applications.

entries.brief: Convert documentation websites, GitHub repositories, and PDFs into Claude AI skills with automatic conflict detection
